name: Do outcomes differ suing in NY vs. Texas for Google AI lawyer errors?
description: NY stronger AI precedent; TX longer time.[1]

mainEntity.name: Do outcomes differ suing in NY vs. Texas for Google AI lawyer errors?

acceptedAnswer.text: NY stronger AI precedent; TX longer time.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Similar negligence standards, but NY federal precedents stronger for AI waiver; TX 4yr SOL longer.[1][2] Factors: venue choice. NY tougher sanctions.
